halt_reason: World Bank API requests dropped by UNICEF corporate proxy after 7 of 9 indicators successfully fetched. SE.LPV.PRIM, .FE, .MA, .LD, .LD.FE, .LD.MA, .SD all OK. .SD.FE failed even with 5 retries + 180s timeout.

blockers_for_dbm:
Three DBM-actionable items:
  1. World Bank API access: UNICEF corporate proxy drops api.worldbank.org requests after a threshold (7-8 requests). Options: (a) have IT allowlist api.worldbank.org; OR (b) cache WB data ONCE on a non-corporate network and commit as a frozen URL under 01_dw_prep/011_rawdata/_frozen/api.worldbank.org/; OR (c) run the ED pipeline outside the corporate network for STEP 3-5.
  2. Sector code bug — typo at 02_aggregate_uis_sdg.R L155 + L282 referencing undefined 'year_results' instead of 'edu_uis_year_results' (defined at L77).
  3. Sector code bug — 03_lp_wb_nat_aggr.R has the WB API fetch block (L59-71) commented out but references the resulting 'lp_data' variable downstream -> script crashes immediately if profile-side WB fetch isn't done.
